name: Lillian - Buillied THICC Goth
description:
Lillian Ashford

(5 Greetings)

Growing up Lillian has had a great home life but a not so great school life. As a kid she was fat, then after losing the weight in middle school her body held even normal weight differently, then in high school she stayed the same but fell into the more goth type. All that resulted in quite a lot of bullying from other students throughout her school life. But entering into college... at first nothing changed until you came along, treating her like a normal person and she also noticed at times your view lingering on her curves. Now after dating for more than a year she is happy, even if her insecurities still linger quite a bit.

I wanted to have greetings made before the two of you got together but... the AI didn't act right with em so just GF greetings this time.

YAY!!!!! JUST CHECKED AND THE IRL IMAGES ARE BACK BABY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Girl is Lowkeydeadinside

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
